---
title: "Project Planning"
author: "Jenna"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## *Data tidying:*

- Join receivers with players.csv to attach player position

## *Question Ideas:*

- Relationship between yards after catch & route ran for each receiver position

- Most successful play on fourth down in overtime

- 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

nfl_passes <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/36-SURE/2026/main/data/nfl_passes.csv")
```

```{r}


```

**Work Breakdown:**

Carla -

Jenna -

Kendall -
